suites.title: Journey 1: Navigate to Print Preferences Page

specs.title: should navigate to Print Preferences via sidebar and verify page content

error.message: Error: MISSING FEATURE: Print Preferences link is not present in the sidebar navigation. The route exists in navigation-config.ts (key: system.printPreferences) and routeTree.gen.ts (path: /system/print-preferences) but is NOT rendered in app-sidebar.tsx's NAV_GROUPS. Users cannot discover or navigate to the Print Preferences page through the sidebar.
